info.description: Professional accreditation badges shown in the 'Certified' strip on the homepage (ICF, CPD, TRE, etc.).

name.description: Short name shown on the badge — e.g. 'ICF', 'CPD', 'TRE®'.

colour.description: Badge border + text colour as a hex value (e.g. #1a5276 navy, #c0392b red, #27ae60 green). Defaults to ink black.

url.description: Optional link to the certifying body's verification page.

logo.description: Optional image badge. If uploaded, replaces the styled text badge.

is_homepage_featured.description: Show in the 'Certified' strip on the homepage.

is_active.description: Untick to HIDE this entry from the public site without deleting it. Useful for seasonal items or things you're drafting privately.

sort_order.description: Lower numbers show first. Use 10, 20, 30 (not 1, 2, 3) so you can drop new entries between existing ones without renumbering everything.
